comment: Config task, no Lua touched — the map tooling was never exercised. Located the commit skill with find+grep over .claude/, which map/ does not index and should not.

The load-bearing question was a data-flow one the index cannot express: which paths mutate the notes/ccs arrays directly rather than through the verbs (answer: resolveCollisions and load dedup). map_query has no way to ask what writes a given @state; I found them by grepping `dirty = true` and `notes[...] = nil`. The .map @state lines with their trailing comments were the fastest way to read indexStale semantics, and map/specs/*.map gave me the spec case-lists in one shot.
